Petition For Breach Of Fiduciary Duty By Trustee
Off Calendar Nov-20-2019 Continued To Jan-15-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Amanda Phillips for Joel Davis (Petitioner).
David Tate for Harold Davis and Herbert Kurlan.

Ms. Phillips stated that they have a fully executed settlement agreement and requested a continuance into the new year. Discussion was held as to whether or not the parties will be bringing a petition for approval of the settlement. The Petition for Breach of Fiduciary Duty by Trustee is continued to January 15, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If any petitions need to be filed, a status report is due by January 8, 2020. If the matter can go off calendar, the Parties are to notify the Court as soon as possible.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.
